# Text Input

> Text entry fields and text editing

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

Text entry fields and text editing

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Single Line Input** — when LineEdit widget is requested, then LineEdit widget completed.
- **Multi Line Input** — when TextEdit widget is requested, then TextEdit widget completed.
- **Text Validation** — when Input filtering and constraints is requested, then Input filtering and constraints completed.
- **Cursor Control** — when Move caret and select text is requested, then Move caret and select text completed.
- **Copy/paste** — when Clipboard integration is requested, then Clipboard integration completed.
